SECURITY STUDIES ROADMAP

SECURITY STUDIES students need practical, industry-relevant skills that connect classroom knowledge to internships, projects, professional practice, and global career opportunities.

RISK ASSESSMENT

RISK ASSESSMENT is a practical skill that helps SECURITY STUDIES students prepare for real professional work.

INTELLIGENCE ANALYSIS

INTELLIGENCE ANALYSIS is a practical skill that helps SECURITY STUDIES students prepare for real professional work.

CRISIS MANAGEMENT

CRISIS MANAGEMENT is a practical skill that helps SECURITY STUDIES students prepare for real professional work.

CYBERSECURITY BASICS

CYBERSECURITY BASICS is a practical skill that helps SECURITY STUDIES students prepare for real professional work.

PHYSICAL SECURITY PLANNING

PHYSICAL SECURITY PLANNING is a practical skill that helps SECURITY STUDIES students prepare for real professional work.

CONFLICT ANALYSIS

CONFLICT ANALYSIS is a practical skill that helps SECURITY STUDIES students prepare for real professional work.

COUNTERTERRORISM STUDIES

COUNTERTERRORISM STUDIES is a practical skill that helps SECURITY STUDIES students prepare for real professional work.

EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT

EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT is a practical skill that helps SECURITY STUDIES students prepare for real professional work.

OSINT

OSINT is a practical skill that helps SECURITY STUDIES students prepare for real professional work.

SECURITY REPORT WRITING

SECURITY REPORT WRITING is a practical skill that helps SECURITY STUDIES students prepare for real professional work.

WHY THESE SKILLS MATTER

PROFESSIONAL READINESS

These skills help students move from theory to practical work.

EMPLOYER DEMAND

Employers value graduates who can use tools, solve problems, and communicate results.

CAREER GROWTH

Building these skills early creates stronger opportunities for internships, projects, and jobs.
